sample_chunks.subject: Math
sample_chunks.text: Numbers help us count things around us. We start counting from zero. The numbers 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 are called natural numbers. We can count objects like apples, books, and pencils using numbers. Counting helps us know how many things we have.

sample_chunks.subject: Math
sample_chunks.text: Shapes are all around us. A triangle has three sides and three corners. A square has four equal sides. A circle has no corners and no sides — it is perfectly round. A rectangle has four sides where opposite sides are equal.
